hero_badge: Official info based · No broker needed
hero_title: Study in Korea without a broker
hero_subtitle: School selection, cost calculation, documents, application, visa prep — all in one place.
features_title: The platform replaces what brokers do
features_subtitle: Block illegal functions, make legal ones more transparent.
diagnose_subtitle: Complete 6 steps to see your study path and required documents.
diagnose_save_description: Save your diagnosis result. You can then consent and submit a separate consultation request.
diagnose_save_success: Your result is saved. Submit a consultation request if you need an expert connection.
diagnose_login_nudge: Sign in to automatically save your diagnosis history to your account.
diagnose_step_goal_title: What study plan are you considering?
diagnose_step_goal_hint: Choose ‘Not sure’ if you have not decided yet.
diagnose_step_profile_title: Tell us about your current situation
diagnose_step_profile_hint: Required documents vary by nationality and education.
diagnose_step_korean_hint: Without an official score, choose the closest current level.
diagnose_step_budget_title: Set your budget and preferred region
diagnose_step_budget_hint: Use the total budget available for your first six months in Korea.
diagnose_step_broker_title: Is anyone currently helping with your preparation?
diagnose_step_broker_hint: Broker cost is used only to compare against official estimates.
diagnose_step_history_hint: Share any visa refusal or stay history for more accurate guidance.
readiness_subtitle: Preparation suitability for this path (reference only)
readiness_disclaimer: This is a reference indicator only. Actual visa results may differ.
readiness_factor_korean_low_for_degree: Korean level insufficient for degree program
readiness_factor_compliance_gaps: Rule engine warnings or missing inputs
schools_subtitle: 50 verified schools. Check accreditation & visa status.
cost_subtitle: Compare broker quote vs official estimate.
cost_warning_broker: Broker quote is higher than official estimate.
docs_subtitle: Prepare documents in order, from school application through post-arrival foreigner registration.
docs_stage_school_desc: Prepare application, education, and language records to the school's requirements.
docs_stage_admission_desc: Secure financial proof and school-issued records for the visa packet.
docs_stage_visa_desc: Submit the D-2 or D-4 packet to the competent Korean diplomatic mission.
docs_stage_arrival_desc: For stays over 90 days, apply for foreigner registration within 90 days of entry.
docs_hint_form: Keep the completed and signed final version.
docs_hint_passport: Upload a clear bio page and check passport validity.
docs_hint_authentication: Confirm translation, notarization, apostille, or consular legalization requirements.
docs_hint_school_specific: Requirement and format vary by the school's admission guide.
docs_hint_financial: Balance and issue-date rules vary by school and mission; confirm just before filing.
docs_hint_school_issued: Upload the original or verifiable electronic document issued by the school.
docs_hint_photo: Use a passport-size photo taken within the last six months.
docs_hint_after_entry: Prepare a document issued after entry into Korea.
docs_hint_residence: Prepare a lease, dormitory confirmation, or accommodation confirmation.
docs_hint_result: Keep the issued result for later stay procedures.
docs_stage_post_grad_desc: Documents for changing to job-seeking (D-10) or employment (E-7) status after graduation. Screening requirements vary; have an administrative expert review before filing.
docs_hint_d10_integrated_application: Download the HiKorea form and mark the D-10 status change.
docs_hint_d10_graduation_certificate: A certificate of expected graduation may also qualify; check with your school office.
docs_hint_d10_job_seeking_plan: The more specific your field and activity plan, the smoother the review.
docs_hint_d10_financial_proof: Balance certificates count from the issue date; get it right before filing.
docs_hint_d10_residence_proof: A lease contract or dormitory confirmation proving where you actually live.
docs_hint_e7_employment_contract: The contract must state duties, wage, and term; check the annual wage requirement notice.
docs_hint_e7_business_registration: Prepared by the employer — request it from the company.
docs_hint_e7_job_description: It must show the role falls under an E-7-eligible occupation.
docs_hint_e7_degree_or_career: Prove the occupation requirement with a degree or career certificate.
partners_subtitle: Sensitive cases → experts. No job matching (legal risk).
auth_student_subtitle: View your cases and document status.
auth_partner_subtitle: Only invited partner-office accounts can sign up.
auth_check_email: Check your email to complete authentication.
footer_disclaimer: Platform provides official-info-based guidance. Visa/stay decisions and administrative submissions belong to experts. Fake documents and illegal jobs are refused.
footer_data_source: Sources: Study in Korea · MOE · MOJ · Legislation
ai_disclaimer: AI gives general info only. Visa cases need expert.
